nodes.context: One of the Five Families of New York; involved in racketeering, murder, and drug trafficking.
One of the Five Families of New York; boss Carmine Persico advised Massino.
One of the Five Families of New York; boss Paul Castellano and capo John Gotti assisted Massino.

edges.context: Massino turned to Colombo boss Carmine Persico for advice on handling the rebellious capos.
Massino sought advice from Gambino boss Paul Castellano, and John Gotti arranged burial of bodies in Gambino graveyard.
